biographical_paragraph: Walter Bruce's oral history is held at the Library of Congress as entry 123 of the Civil Rights History Project (American Folklife Center accession AFC 2010/039) [src: 1]. The LoC transcript carries a not-auditable audit tier: the catalog cannot independently certify the transcript against primary sources for this entry, and any specific biographical or quoted claims should be confirmed against external archives before citation.
